title: dryopteris oosora
intro: Dryopteris oosora, also known as the Autumn fern or Japanese autumn fern, is a species of deciduous fern native to Japan. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris oosora include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Dryopteris oosora is typically prepared as a tea or used in traditional Japanese herbal remedies such as kampo and kustsu, which combine the plant with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
